description:
## What it does

SunPump Agent Token Launch API lets agents, scripts, and applications pay with x402 and submit token launch metadata to SunPump. The gateway forwards the caller's JSON payload to the SunPump launch endpoint after payment settlement.

## Best for

- Agent workflows that need to create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.
- Operator tools that want one paid API call for token creation.
- Mainnet payment flows across TRON and BSC while using the same SunPump launch request shape.

## Request shape

POST a JSON body with `name`, `symbol`, `description`, `imageBase64`, `twitterUrl`, `telegramUrl`, `websiteUrl`, and `tweetUsername`. Keep `name` within 1-20 characters and use a unique symbol. `imageBase64` may include a base64-encoded token image; if it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically.

## Code usage

Use `x402-cli pay` against the route for the mainnet payment chain you want. TRON Mainnet example:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402MainA","symbol":"X4M17","description":"x402 launch","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

BSC Mainnet uses `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` with `eip155:56` and the same JSON body.

endpoints.description: Submit token metadata to SunPump after x402 payment settlement. `imageBase64` can carry a base64-encoded token image; when it is empty or omitted, SunPump generates an image automatically. The response includes SunPump status and token data such as token id, owner address, contract address, logo URL, create transaction hash, reserves, and market data when available.

zh-CN.description: 在 x402 支付结算后向 SunPump 提交发币元数据。`imageBase64` 可以携带 base64 编码的 token 图片；为空或不传时，SunPump 会自动生成图片。响应包含 SunPump 状态和 token 数据，例如 token id、owner address、contract address、logo URL、create transaction hash、储备和市场数据等。
zh-CN.subtitle: 根据元数据创建 SunPump token
zh-CN.title: Agent 发币
zh-CN.useCase: 适合 Agent 或后端已经校验好发币元数据，准备正式创建 token 的场景。

endpoints.subtitle: Create a SunPump token from metadata
endpoints.title: Launch Agent Token
endpoints.use_case: Use this endpoint when an agent or backend has already validated launch metadata and is ready to create the token.

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

SunPump Agent 发币 API 允许 Agent、脚本和应用先完成 x402 支付，再把发币元数据提交给 SunPump。Gateway 在支付结算后把调用方的 JSON 请求体转发到 SunPump 发币接口。

## 适合场景

- 需要基于结构化元数据创建 meme token 或 agent token 的 Agent 工作流。
- 希望用一次付费 API 调用完成发币的运营工具。
- 在 TRON 和 BSC 主网上使用同一套 SunPump 发币请求格式验证支付流程。

## 请求格式

POST JSON 请求体包含 `name`、`symbol`、`description`、`imageBase64`、`twitterUrl`、`telegramUrl`、`websiteUrl` 和 `tweetUsername`。`name` 需要保持在 1-20 个字符内，并使用唯一 symbol。`imageBase64` 可以传入 base64 编码的 token 图片；如果为空或不传，SunPump 会自动生成图片。

## 代码用法

使用 `x402-cli pay` 调用目标主网支付链对应的路由。TRON 主网示例：

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/sunpump-token-launch-tron/pump-api/ai/agentTokenLaunch' \
  --method POST \
  --network tron:mainnet \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit \
  --max-amount 0.001 \
  --header 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  --body '{"name":"X402MainA","symbol":"X4M17","description":"x402 launch","imageBase64":"","twitterUrl":"","telegramUrl":"","websiteUrl":"","tweetUsername":""}'
```

BSC 主网使用 `sunpump-token-launch-bsc` 和 `eip155:56`，请求体相同。
zh-CN.mainTitle: 一次付费完成 Agent 代币发行(x402)
zh-CN.subtitle: 用结构化元数据一次付费发币(meme/Agent 代币)。
zh-CN.title: SunPump
zh-CN.useCase: 适合应用、Agent 或 CLI 流程在 x402 支付成功后调用 SunPump 发币接口。根据主网支付链选择 TRON 主网或 BSC 主网路由。

main_title: One-call agent token launch, paid via x402

sub_title: Create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.

subtitle: Create a meme or agent token from structured metadata.
title: SunPump
use_case: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs to launch a SunPump token after a successful x402 payment. Choose the route matching the intended mainnet payment chain: TRON Mainnet or BSC Mainnet.
